title: LEGO Set Match Builder
tagline: Start with one brick and discover which owned sets it likely belongs to.
author: bcumbie
narrative: Build a LEGO helper where someone enters a single LEGO piece and the app cross-references it against the sets they own, tracks each set's condition such as fully built or missing pieces, and suggests which sets the piece most likely goes with.
description: Build a LEGO helper where someone enters a single LEGO piece and the app cross-references it against the sets they own, tracks each set's condition such as fully built or missing pieces, and suggests which sets the piece most likely goes with.

userStory.iWant: to enter one piece and compare it to the sets I already own
userStory.soThat: I can quickly figure out where the piece belongs and what sets may be incomplete

notes.title: First demo scope
notes.text: Start with a single piece lookup, owned set matching, and a simple status flag for built versus missing pieces.
notes.author: bcumbie
